name: Dinner Mint Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cocoa, salt, milk, and corn syrup in a heavy 3-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils.
3. Cover and boil for 3 minutes. Remove the cover and continue cooking until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (234°F).
4. Remove from heat and let cool for 10 minutes.
5. Add butter and creme de menthe; beat until slightly thickened (about 2 minutes).
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
7. Allow to cool, then cut into 2-inch squares.
